meta.title: Maths Flashcards – Fractions, Decimals and Percentages
meta.description: Interactive flashcards for fractions, decimals and percentages conversions
meta.author: Kharadi Enterprise

cards.question: What is 1/2 as a decimal?
cards.answer: 0.5. Think: divide 1 by 2 = 0.5. Visual: Imagine a circle (like a pizza) split into 2 equal halves – one half shaded. That's 1/2 = 0.5 = 50%.

cards.question: What is 1/4 as a decimal?
cards.answer: 0.25. Think: divide 1 by 4 = 0.25. Visual: Imagine a circle split into 4 equal quarters – one quarter shaded. That's 1/4 = 0.25 = 25%.

cards.question: What is 3/4 as a decimal?
cards.answer: 0.75. Think: 3 divided by 4 = 0.75, or 3×0.25 = 0.75. Visual: A circle split into 4 equal quarters – three quarters shaded. That's 3/4 = 0.75 = 75%.

cards.question: What is 1/5 as a decimal?
cards.answer: 0.2. Think: divide 1 by 5 = 0.2. Visual: Imagine a bar split into 5 equal parts – one part shaded. That's 1/5 = 0.2 = 20%.

cards.question: What is 2/5 as a decimal?
cards.answer: 0.4. Think: 2 divided by 5 = 0.4, or 2×0.2 = 0.4. Visual: A bar split into 5 equal parts – two parts shaded. That's 2/5 = 0.4 = 40%.

cards.question: What is 1/10 as a decimal?
cards.answer: 0.1. Think: divide 1 by 10 = 0.1. Visual: Imagine a number line from 0 to 1, split into 10 equal sections – one section is 1/10 = 0.1 = 10%.

cards.question: What is 50% as a fraction?
cards.answer: 1/2. Think: 50% means 50 out of 100 = 50/100 = 1/2 when simplified. Visual: Half of a pizza or half of a rectangle shaded.

cards.question: What is 25% as a fraction?
cards.answer: 1/4. Think: 25% means 25 out of 100 = 25/100 = 1/4 when simplified. Visual: One quarter of a circle or one quarter of a square shaded.

cards.question: What is 75% as a fraction?
cards.answer: 3/4. Think: 75% means 75 out of 100 = 75/100 = 3/4 when simplified. Visual: Three quarters of a circle shaded (like three slices of a 4-slice pizza).

cards.question: What is 50% as a decimal?
cards.answer: 0.5. Think: 50% = 50/100 = 0.50 = 0.5. Or divide 50 by 100. Visual: Half of any shape = 0.5 of the whole.

cards.question: What is 25% as a decimal?
cards.answer: 0.25. Think: 25% = 25/100 = 0.25. Or divide 25 by 100. Visual: One quarter of a pie chart or one quarter of a bar shaded.

cards.question: What is 0.5 as a percentage?
cards.answer: 50%. Think: multiply 0.5 by 100 = 50%. Or 0.5 = 5/10 = 50/100 = 50%. Visual: Half a pie, half a bar, or half a number line = 50%.

cards.question: What is 0.25 as a percentage?
cards.answer: 25%. Think: multiply 0.25 by 100 = 25%. Or 0.25 = 25/100 = 25%. Visual: One quarter of a circle, square, or bar = 25%.

cards.question: What is 1/2 as a percentage?
cards.answer: 50%. Think: 1/2 = 0.5, then 0.5×100 = 50%. Or 1/2 = 50/100 = 50%. Visual: Half a pie chart, half a rectangle, or half a clock face = 50%.

cards.question: What is 1/4 as a percentage?
cards.answer: 25%. Think: 1/4 = 0.25, then 0.25×100 = 25%. Or 1/4 = 25/100 = 25%. Visual: One quarter of a circle, one slice of a 4-slice pizza = 25%.

cards.question: Simplify 2/4
cards.answer: 1/2. Divide both top and bottom by 2: 2÷2=1, 4÷2=2, so 2/4 = 1/2. Visual: Two shaded parts out of four equals the same as one shaded part out of two – they cover the same area.

cards.question: Simplify 3/6
cards.answer: 1/2. Divide both top and bottom by 3: 3÷3=1, 6÷3=2, so 3/6 = 1/2. Visual: Three shaded parts out of six equals half the shape – same as 1/2.

cards.question: Simplify 4/8
cards.answer: 1/2. Divide both top and bottom by 4: 4÷4=1, 8÷4=2, so 4/8 = 1/2. Visual: Four shaded parts out of eight covers exactly half of the shape – same as 1/2.

cards.question: What is 1/3 as a decimal (to 2 dp)?
cards.answer: 0.33. Think: divide 1 by 3 = 0.333... which rounds to 0.33 (to 2 decimal places). Visual: A circle split into 3 equal parts – one shaded is about one-third, slightly less than half.

cards.question: What is 2/3 as a decimal (to 2 dp)?
cards.answer: 0.67. Think: divide 2 by 3 = 0.666... which rounds to 0.67 (to 2 decimal places). Visual: A circle split into 3 equal parts – two shaded covers about two-thirds, slightly more than half.
